metadata.title:
PINCHOT WILL BE


HERE in AUGUST

pages.raw_text:
Clifford Pinchot, chief of the for
est service Of the United States de-
partment of agriculture, will be
present at the sessions of the ma
tional irrigation congress in Spo-
kane August to IA He says in
a letter to r. Insinger, chairman
of the local board of control:


Il do not intend to be stopped
from getting to the national irriga-
ton congrs S, and if | am stopped
1t will not be because of any lack
of effort on my part from now on.


The imperial German consul, sta
tione dat Seattle, says in his let
ter to Mr.. Insinger:


at will give me great pleasure
to be present at your gathering
the coming summer, if my official
duties will allow me to leave Sc
attic at that time"
